data.q: What is API Platform in the context of PHP?
o: A PHP framework to build APIs and manage OpenAPI documentation
A debugging tool for PHP applications
data.e: API Platform is a framework to build API-first projects in PHP, supporting OpenAPI specification out of the box.

data.q: Which format does API Platform use by default to document APIs?
data.e: API Platform automatically generates OpenAPI (formerly Swagger) documentation for APIs.

data.q: How do you expose a PHP entity as a REST API resource using API Platform?
o: By adding the #[ApiResource] attribute or ApiResource annotation to the entity class
By extending a base API class
By creating a YAML configuration file only
By writing a controller with custom REST routes
data.e: API Platform uses the #[ApiResource] PHP attribute (or annotation) to expose an entity as an API resource.

data.q: Which PHP package is primarily used to generate OpenAPI documentation in API Platform?
data.e: The api-platform/core package manages API building and OpenAPI documentation generation.

data.q: How can you customize the OpenAPI documentation title in API Platform?
o: By modifying the 'title' option in api_platform.yaml configuration
By annotating each entity with a title
By changing the main index.php file
data.e: You customize OpenAPI docs via the api_platform.yaml file under the openapi configuration.

data.q: Which Symfony bundle is integrated with API Platform to automatically generate and expose OpenAPI docs?
data.e: ApiPlatformBundle is the Symfony bundle that integrates API Platform, handling resource management and OpenAPI docs.

data.q: Can API Platform support GraphQL in addition to REST?
o: Yes, via built-in support for GraphQL endpoints
No, only REST APIs are supported
GraphQL requires separate configuration unrelated to API Platform
data.e: API Platform supports GraphQL natively, allowing automatic GraphQL endpoint generation.

data.q: Which command is used to install API Platform using Composer?
data.e: Installing API Platform in existing projects is done with composer require api-platform/core.

data.q: What is the role of the OpenAPI Generator in API Platform?
o: To generate client SDKs and server stubs based on the OpenAPI spec
data.e: OpenAPI Generator uses the API schema to generate clients and server code across languages.

data.q: How to add a custom operation to an API resource in API Platform that appears in OpenAPI docs?
o: By defining a custom operation in the resource annotation or attribute with an OpenAPI context
By creating manual OpenAPI YAML files only
By adding a route in routes.yaml unrelated to the API resource
data.e: Custom operations are annotated in the resource with an 'openapi_context' to include details in docs.
